description_long: This is a single dark gray leather lace-up shoe with a rounded toe and a low-profile silhouette. The upper features subtle decorative perforations and stitching details along the sides and toe cap, giving it a slightly formal yet casual appearance. The laces are black and threaded through five pairs of eyelets, with a padded collar for added comfort. The sole is a contrasting light brown rubber with a visible tread, providing grip and durability for urban walking. The interior appears cushioned, likely lined with fabric or synthetic material for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A dark gray leather lace-up shoe with decorative stitching, a padded collar, and a light brown rubber sole with visible tread.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, lacing, and subtle perforations on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the decorative stitching, padded collar, and the full profile of the light brown sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, padded collar, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing stitching details and the sole's profile.
